text:
The Tethered Together Ropenspace
Tethered Together calls Ropenspace facilitated, self-organizing peer education run using Open Space Technology. Instead of staff choosing a fixed curriculum, participants are asked what they want to do and are helped to organize it. Attendees can pose questions to the room, share their own rope interests, and move among evolving classes, discussions, and hands-on skill shares. The site describes the result as an experience shaped to participants' interests, skills, and passions.
title: The Tethered Together Ropenspace
